remarks: Incredible value for a premium end-unit condo in a highly desirable Norwalk community! This beautifully maintained home offers the rare convenience of single-floor living combined with the exceptional privacy, extra natural light, and the quiet of a premier end-unit location. Recent Premium Updates: Brand-new, high-efficiency propane furnace installed 12/2025; private balcony entirely rebuilt/new in 10/2024. Everyday Conveniences: Private attached garage, separate dedicated storage unit, and in-unit laundry featuring a smart washer/dryer (2021). Indoor/Outdoor Comforts: A cozy fireplace highlights the living area, paired with central heat and air conditioning for perfect year-round climate control. Enjoy low-maintenance living with an affordable HOA that includes beautiful mature landscaping and a refreshing in-ground pool. A Commuter's Dream: Seamlessly access NYC by car or train. Sidewalks lead directly to the Merritt 7 commuter train station just 0.3 miles away, and the complex sits just minutes from the Merritt Parkway and I-95. Enjoy unmatched convenience with grocery stores, the SoNo Collection mall, and premier shopping along Main, Connecticut, and Westport Avenues right at your fingertips, plus access to Norwalk's beautiful town beaches and parks. Whether you're purchasing your first home, downsizing, or seeking a carefree lifestyle, this peaceful retreat offers a rare balance of convenience, modern updates, and unmatched value. Schedule your showing today!
